untranslatable_reason: Price clustering detection at round numbers (0.00, 0.25, 0.50, 0.10, 0.05) and clustering_intensity_threshold metric are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal requires pattern recognition of order clustering at psychological price levels which cannot be directly expressed with provided technical indicators. ATR < 1% used as proxy for small price increment requirement, but round-number clustering intensity cannot be measured.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture volatility (hvol_20 > 40th percentile) and volume mid-range conditions (vol_ratio_20 between 25th-75th percentile). Exit conditions use pivot points as proxy for support/resistance levels being broken. The core mechanism of detecting and trading around round-number order clustering is not implementable with given indicators and would require custom clustering detection logic.
